$schema_note: type codes - A custom 3D model, B Spline scene, C procedural Three.js, D photography, E video, F SVG/UI, G AI-generated, H reusable shared. status - live | needs-rebuild | optional-extension | slot | upgrade-path.

process.rule: Value upgrading, torrefaction and Black Wood Pellet are downstream optional extensions after Finished product Unit, not core units.

assets.name: Hero wood pellet
assets.optimization: single mesh, vertex colors, R3F shader

assets.name: Raw material storage scene
assets.source: procedural loaded log truck, staged logs and receiving yard

assets.name: Woods chipping machine and warehouse entrance
assets.source: procedural chipper, feed table, handler, inclined conveyor and large hall context

assets.name: Wet grinding unit
assets.source: procedural first grinding station for moist chip feed

assets.name: Buffer storage
assets.source: procedural large buffer bin/silo after wet grinding, with green frame and conveyor handoff
assets.optimization: use procedural bin, level mass and feeder

assets.name: Drying unit
assets.source: procedural ducted drying/cyclone line in green factory frame after buffer storage
assets.optimization: use procedural dryer/drying line with haze

assets.name: Recovery unit
assets.source: procedural recovery/screen line with repeated boxes, long conveyor and jumbo bags
assets.optimization: procedural cyclone/filter, reject dust, recovered feed

assets.name: Dried grinding unit
assets.source: procedural second dry grinding bank, visually distinct from wet grinding by scale and dust control
assets.optimization: reuse grinder kit with dry dust control

assets.name: Pelletizer unit
assets.source: procedural pelletizer bank with cream press bodies, green frame, feed hoppers and pellet conveyor

assets.name: Finished product unit
assets.source: procedural finished product bagging area with jumbo bags, product stacks and small forklift

assets.name: Optional value-upgrading path
assets.source: downstream extension after Finished product Unit
assets.fallback: can be hidden or moved into a separate branch

assets.name: Material flow bridge system
assets.source: world-space handoff layer active during station travel windows
assets.optimization: conveyors/chutes/bins should match material state at each step

assets.name: Authored GLB machine pack
assets.source: future commissioned models for corrected process units
